entries.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate an understanding of devotion to God as revealed in the Bible
entries.specific_competence: 3.1 Demonstrate mastery of the Holy Scripture in the Gospel according to Luke
entries.learning_activity: (a) Explain the term Gospel and Jewish institutions
teaching_learning_activities: Debate: Organize two groups to run the motion about the Gospel and Jewish institutions Let them classify the books of the Gospel
entries.assessment: The term Gospel and the books of the Gospel, as well as Jewish institutions are are well explained.
resources: relevant biblical books such as commentaries
entries.references: TIE, Bible Knowledge for Secondary Schools Form Three: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education
